libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Do not add a Docker service or extra Maven dependency for core WebClient coverage. Use local Vert.x HttpServer/WebClient tests. Ensure native test execution for 5.0.1 sets runtime JVM system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true`, e.g. by extending the existing Gradle `nativeTest` runtimeArgs condition from only `5.0.0` to include `5.0.1` or all affected Vert.x 5.0.x/Netty 4.2.x versions.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Optional Vert.x Web Client areas such as OAuth2 helpers or POJO databind may require optional/test-only dependencies, but they are not required for meaningful core coverage.

The reported failure includes Netty native-image runtime connection resets caused by `PlatformDependent0.safeConstructPutInt`, so local Gradle and Native Image verification should confirm the system-property fix.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves to Vert.x core with Netty 4.2.2.Final; normal WebClient coverage is reachable with an in-process Vert.x HTTP server, but native-image runtime on JDK 25 needs the same Netty unsafe/reflection system properties already used for 5.0.0.
